description: Experience freshness all day with this superior fragrance from tabac man. Launched by the design house of Maurer & Wirtz in 1959, this cologne is classified as a sharp, gentle, floral fragrance. This masculine scent possesses a blend of lavender, citrus, and warm florals. It is recommended for casual wear. Quantity: 150 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eye
